queries.question: Which accessibility feature is common across all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Accessibility_Features.featureName  from Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features join Accessibility_Features on Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features.accessibilityFeatureId = Accessibility_Features.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features.accessibilityFeatureId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features.streamingServiceId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: For each streaming service, what are the associated feature names of accessibility features?
queries.sql: select streaming_services.servicename , accessibility_features.featurename from Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features join Accessibility_Features on Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features.accessibilityFeatureId = Accessibility_Features.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features.streamingServiceId = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?servicename ?featurename WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_accessibility_features a :Streaming_Services_Accessibility_Features .
  ?accessibility_features a :Accessibility_Features .
  ?streaming_services_accessibility_features p:hasAccessibility_Features ?accessibility_features .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_accessibility_features p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:serviceName ?servicename .
  ?accessibility_features p:featureName ?featurename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which accessibility features are available for each streaming service?
